tips.tip: Gehun ki buvai November ke pehle hafte mein karein — der se buvai mein yield kam hoti hai
Sarson ki fasal mein pehla paani buvai ke 25-30 din baad dein
Gehun mein urea ki top dressing 3 baar karein — buvai ke 21, 42 aur 60 din baad
Chana ki fasal mein pod borer ke liye dhyan rakhein — January-February mein spray karein
Dhaan ki ropai June ke teesre hafte se shuru karein — nursery 21 din pehle tayyaar karein
Makka mein zinc ki kami se patte peele padte hain — zinc sulphate 25 kg/hectare dalein
Kapas mein chitte makode ke liye neem ka tel spray karein — 5ml/litre paani mein
Soybean ki katai 90-100 din mein karein — jab 80% phaliyan bhuri ho jayein
Tarbooz ki buvai February end ya March start mein karein — acchi dhoop zaruri hai
Moong dalhan mein sulphur ki kami se phool kam aate hain — buvai ke samay sulphur dalein

general_tips.tip_hindi: Har 2 saal mein mitti ki jaanch karwaayein. Soil Health Card Scheme mein free hoti hai.
general_tips.tip_english: Get soil tested every 2 years. Free under Soil Health Card Scheme.

general_tips.tip_hindi: Boond-boond sinchai (drip irrigation) se 60% paani bachta hai aur fasal bhi acchi hoti hai.
general_tips.tip_english: Drip irrigation saves 60% water and improves crop yield.

general_tips.tip_hindi: Gobar ki khaad aur vermicompost daalein — chemical khad se zameen kharab hoti hai.
general_tips.tip_english: Use cow dung and vermicompost — chemical fertilizers degrade soil over time.

general_tips.tip_hindi: Neem ka tel sabse accha organic keetnashak hai. 5ml neem tel + 1 litre paani mein milaakar spray karein.
general_tips.tip_english: Neem oil is the best organic pesticide. Mix 5ml neem oil in 1 litre water and spray.

general_tips.tip_hindi: PM Fasal Bima Yojana mein fasal ka insurance karwaayein — bahut sasta hai aur nuksan ka paisa milta hai.
general_tips.tip_english: Insure crops under PM Fasal Bima Yojana — cheap premiums and covers natural disasters.
